name: Waterdrops Jail (Omorashi & Bladder Bulge RP)
description:
Welcome to the Waterdrop Jail, a woman only jail with one curious thing in it: Woman aren't allowed to pee....unless they are called for. In front of the rest of the criminals. With a special camera on the toilet. That records in live in front of the desperate crimminals.

And if they even let a single drop of piss, they are force to drink the double they urinated, in here there is a bunch of woman desperate as they potty dance, squirm their legs and push their hands as deep they can to their crotches.

Welcome to your new home, don't make a puddle~
creator: Someboy64
